description: Input schema for Kling v2.0 Master Text-to-Video.

prompt.description: The text prompt describing the video to generate.
examples: A golden retriever running through a field of sunflowers at sunset
prompt.title: Prompt

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video.

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds (5 or 10).

cfg_scale.description: Classifier-free guidance scale. Controls how closely the video follows the prompt.
cfg_scale.title: Cfg Scale

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt to guide generation away from unwanted content.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

title: AppInput
